creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Actually there is another PR aiming to install the same fonts:

<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=118331>

Could you please check PR ports/118331 ?

What about closing your PR, and collaborating with Jacula Modyun on this
one?

Truly yours,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
